title: wolftpm_rs_shim.c: direct access to dev->ctx.cmdBuf
description: wolftpm-sys/src/wolftpm_rs_shim.c directly accesses dev->ctx.cmdBuf (WOLFTPM2_CTX.cmdBuf), which is an internal field not declared as stable API in wolfTPM headers. Any refactor or layout change in WOLFTPM2_CTX between wolfTPM versions will produce a silent mismatch: the shim will write/read at wrong offsets, potentially corrupting memory or producing garbage TPM responses with no compile error. This is the highest-severity coupling risk in the crate.
